post_study_work_visa.name: Temporary Graduate Visa (subclass 485)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Open work rights — no employer sponsorship needed. Duration depends on qualification level and study location.

language_requirement: English (IELTS 6.5+ overall, 6.0+ per band typically required)
scholarship_availability: Moderate — Australia Awards for developing country nationals. University-specific merit scholarships. Destination Australia for regional campus programs.
path_to_pr: Points-based skilled migration (subclass 189/190). MBA + Australian work experience = competitive PR application. Typical timeline: 2-4 years.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted at all major programs. Some offer waivers for 5+ years professional experience.
